---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
fig-width: 12  
---

::: {style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 2em; margin-top: 1em;"}
::: {style="flex-grow: 1;"}
# Congenital Aortic Stenosis
:::
::: {style="display: flex; gap: 1em; align-items: center;"}
![](hds_logo.svg){width="80px"} ![](ohdsi_logo.svg){width="80px"}
:::
:::


```{r loading results, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)

# Load all CSV results
all_results <- list.files(
  path = "data",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
) |>
  lapply(read.csv) |>
  bind_rows()

# Filter and prepare survival data for table
survival_table <- all_results |>
  filter(
    result_id %in% c(13, 17),
    variable_name == "outcome"
  ) |>
  select(cdm_name, group_level, variable_level, estimate_name, estimate_value) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = estimate_name,
    values_from = estimate_value
  ) |>
  mutate(
    # Format median survival with CI
    median_survival_formatted = case_when(
      is.na(median_survival) | median_survival == "NA" ~ "–",
      TRUE ~ sprintf(
        "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
        as.numeric(median_survival),
        as.numeric(median_survival_95CI_lower),
        as.numeric(median_survival_95CI_higher)
      )
    ),
    # Format restricted mean survival with CI
    restricted_mean_survival_formatted = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      as.numeric(restricted_mean_survival),
      as.numeric(restricted_mean_survival_95CI_lower),
      as.numeric(restricted_mean_survival_95CI_upper)
    ),
    estimate_name = "Restricted mean survival"
  ) |>
  select(
    `CDM name` = cdm_name,
    `Target cohort` = group_level,
    `Outcome name` = variable_level,
    `Number records` = number_records_count,
    `Number events` = n_events_count,
    `Median survival (95% CI)` = median_survival_formatted,
    `Estimate name` = estimate_name,
    `Restricted mean survival (95% CI)` = restricted_mean_survival_formatted
  ) |>
  arrange(`CDM name`, `Target cohort`, `Outcome name`)

# Prepare survival curve data for plotting
survival_curves <- all_results |>
  filter(
    result_id %in% c(11, 15),
    variable_name == "outcome",
    estimate_name %in% c("estimate", "estimate_95CI_lower", "estimate_95CI_upper")
  ) |>
  select(cdm_name, group_level, variable_level, estimate_name, estimate_value, additional_level) |>
  mutate(
    time = as.numeric(additional_level),
    estimate_value = as.numeric(estimate_value)
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = estimate_name,
    values_from = estimate_value
  ) |>
  rename(
    survival_prob = estimate,
    ci_lower = estimate_95CI_lower,
    ci_upper = estimate_95CI_upper,
    target_cohort = group_level,
    outcome = variable_level
  ) |>
  mutate(
    cohort_outcome = paste0("(", target_cohort, ",", 
                           ifelse(outcome == "avr", "1", "2"), ")")
  )

```

## Survival Analysis Results
### Summary Table

```{r survival-table, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
survival_table |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(title = "Survival Analysis Results") |>
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(
      `Number records`, 
      `Number events`, 
      `Median survival (95% CI)`,
      `Restricted mean survival (95% CI)`
    )
  ) |>
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = c(`CDM name`, `Target cohort`, `Outcome name`, `Estimate name`)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_borders(sides = "all", color = "#D3D3D3", weight = px(1)),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#F0F0F0"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(12),
    heading.align = "left"
  )
```

### Survival Curves

```{r survival-plots, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
survival_curves |>
  mutate(
    # Create display labels matching the image
    cohort_label = paste0("(", target_cohort, ",", 
                         ifelse(outcome == "avr", "1", "2"), ")")
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = survival_prob, 
             color = target_cohort, 
             fill = target_cohort,
             linetype = outcome)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), alpha = 0.3, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ cdm_name, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "congenital_aortic_stenosis" = "#F8766D",
      "congenital_aortic_valve_disease" = "#00BFC4"
    ),
    name = "Target cohort"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "congenital_aortic_stenosis" = "#F8766D",
      "congenital_aortic_valve_disease" = "#00BFC4"
    ),
    name = "Target cohort"
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("avr" = "solid", "death_cohort" = "dashed"),
    labels = c("avr" = "AVR", "death_cohort" = "Death"),
    name = "Outcome"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time in days",
    y = "Survival probability",
    title = "Survival Analysis by CDM and Target Cohort"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#E0E0E0", color = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```
